title: Payment API Timeout Simulation
root_cause: Commit 5610a41 incorrectly introduced a synchronous sleep blocking the thread.
similar_pattern: Similar blocking issue found in auth routes previously.

title: Authentication KeyError
root_cause: Commit 88f8976 accessed 'password' instead of 'hashed_password' from the user dictionary.
similar_pattern: Typo in dictionary access during refactoring.

title: JWT Token Expiration TypeError
error_message: TypeError: 'str' object cannot be interpreted as an integer
log_excerpt: 2026-05-01T16:05:00Z ERROR [auth-core] Failed to encode JWT token in create_access_token
root_cause: Commit 5d0a8dd hardcoded expiration as string instead of a datetime object.
fix_applied: Reverted expiration to dynamically calculate datetime.

title: Notification UserID TypeError
error_message: TypeError: unsupported operand type(s) for +: 'int' and 'str'
root_cause: Commit 14e231e concatenated user_id (int) with an empty string implicitly.
fix_applied: Removed the string concatenation and preserved integer type.

title: Global Authentication Failure
root_cause: Commit 241b657 explicitly set email to None instead of extracting it from the JWT payload.
fix_applied: Restored extracting 'sub' from the decoded JWT payload.
similar_pattern: Disabled features incorrectly merged to main.
